title: langdetect: import passes HTML to detector
description:
In import.rs:283, detect_language(&content_clean) receives ammonia::clean output which is sanitized HTML (still contains

, ,
etc), not plain text. This feeds HTML tag names and URL attributes to whatlang, degrading detection accuracy. Fix: apply strip_html_tags (already exists in posting.rs) to content_clean before passing to detect_language.
